title: delphinium minutibracteolatum
intro: Delphinium minutibracteolatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the small-bracted larkspur or small-bract larkspur. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a vasodilator and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Delphinium minutibracteolatum are thought to include the improvement of cardiovascular health, as well as the reduction of pain and fever. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds and respiratory issues.
